THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYERS, JUSTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAINEZ, REMBERTO SAINEZ, ERIKA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED A BREACH OF HABITABILITY WARRANTY FOR MOLD INFESTATION WHICH WAS NOT REMEDIATED BY DEFENDANT'S UPON NOTICE. DAMAGES ARE LIMITED TO THE RELATIVELY LOW LEVELS FOUND BY THE MOLD EXPERT. JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY FOR BOTH DEFENDANT'S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
